blockers_encountered.description: Pre-existing test tests/test_proxy.py::TestShutdownHandlers::test_sigterm_handler_checkpoints_circuit_breaker_state asserted the LAUNCHER SIGTERM handler writes cb_state.json — exactly the buggy launcher-side checkpoint that FIX-1 removes.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Rewrote it as test_sigterm_handler_does_not_checkpoint_state: the launcher flushes S3 but must NOT write cb_state.json (the litellm child is the single writer). In-scope (tests/ is in MODIFY).

blockers_encountered.description: `uv run pytest` used an ephemeral pytest without project deps (ModuleNotFoundError: dotenv). pytest lives in the optional 'test' extra (not 'dev').
blockers_encountered.resolution: Ran tests with `uv run --extra test pytest`. No code/config change; pyproject untouched.

dev/smoketest/run_isolated_instance.sh: added a `restart` subcommand (+ reap_port_listeners helper) that stops the launcher, reaps the orphaned litellm child holding the test port, and relaunches PRESERVING the runtime state dir.
